text:
NAME: CLM_RP_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: R = bypass representative payee 

COMMENT: This field comes from the CLM-RP-IND-CD that is present on the first claim record included in the stay. If 
there is no CLM-RP-IND-CD on the first claim, then take the first found code (R) on any of the other 
claims that make up the stay. 

This field is new in 2015. 

Note that there is also a Revenue Center Representative Payee (RP) Indicator Code (SAS variable called
